description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on pull requests and workflow dispatches. The workflow uses a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs and runs on an ubuntu-latest environment. It consists of two jobs: one to get the latest Python versions and another to run CI tests on a matrix of Python versions. The CI job checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs Poetry, loads cached environments, installs dependencies, runs pre-commit checks, and executes tests with coverage reporting.
